prompts.title: Summarize Article
prompts.text:
Please summarize the following article in {length} sentences, focusing on the key points and main arguments:

{article_text}
prompts.description: Condense long articles into concise summaries

prompts.title: Code Review
prompts.text:
Review the following {language} code for:
1. Performance issues
2. Security vulnerabilities
3. Best practices
4. Code readability

Provide specific suggestions for improvement.

Code:
```
{code}
```
prompts.description: Get detailed code reviews and improvement suggestions

prompts.title: Social Media Caption
Bug Report Template

Explain Like I'm Five
prompts.text: Explain {concept} in simple terms that a 5-year-old could understand. Use analogies and everyday examples.
